rows: BEGIN; UPDATE orders SET status=$1 WHERE ...
SELECT o.*, c.* FROM orders o JOIN customers c
narrative_hint: PID 3104 is idle in transaction for 180 seconds — this is the head blocker. PIDs 1842 and 2201 are both waiting on a relation lock for over 40 seconds, blocked by PID 3104. The idle in transaction session is holding a row lock while the client application is unresponsive or thinking. Claude should identify PID 3104 as the root cause, recommend setting idle_in_transaction_session_timeout to prevent recurrence, and suggest terminating PID 3104 immediately to unblock the waiting sessions.
